visuals.title: RPC Communication Flow
visuals.description: Visual diagram for RPC Communication Flow
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Introduction to Distributed Systems</text>
  
  <!-- Central Node -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="175" r="40" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="210" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Central Node
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Node 1 -->
  <circle cx="100" cy="100" r="30" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="100" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Node 1
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Node 2 -->
  <circle cx="320" cy="100" r="30" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="320" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Node 2
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Node 3 -->
  <circle cx="100" cy="250" r="30" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="100" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Node 3
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Node 4 -->
  <circle cx="320" cy="250" r="30" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="320" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Node 4
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Connection Lines -->
  <line x1="210" y1="135" x2="100" y2="100" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="210" y1="135" x2="320" y2="100" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="210" y1="215" x2="100" y2="250" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="210" y1="215" x2="320" y2="250" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Data Flow Animation -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="135" r="5" fill="#FF5722" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
    <animate attributeName="cx" from="210" to="100" dur="0.8s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
    <animate attributeName="cy" from="135" to="100" dur="0.8s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  
  <circle cx="210" cy="135" r="5" fill="#FF5722" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
    <animate attributeName="cx" from="210" to="320" dur="0.8s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
    <animate attributeName="cy" from="135" to="100" dur="0.8s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
</svg>
